projectName: Blackmagic Design DaVinci Resolve 20 Beginner's Guide
notes: r2n-test-3 is an official editorial baseline sample derived from Blackmagic training material.
Tier 1 is sufficient for committed lightweight importer, reconciliation, delivery-planning, execution-prep, staging, and package-contract checks for r2n-test-3.
Tier 2 stays local-only so the reference mp4 and large otioz do not become part of normal repo verification.
This sample is editorial baseline only. It does not claim production-audio or field-recorder proof.
